description: Bifolium from a court ledger. The dates range from Adar II through Sivan of 1410 Seleucid, which is 1099 CE. At least one is in the hand of Hillel b. ʿEli, with his signature. Three of the four entries are signed by Yiṣḥaq b. Shemu'el Needs much more examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
